speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] First up on the Green Desk, and this is absolutely beautiful news. <cite index="2-2">Giant pandas are no longer classified as endangered</cite> after decades of conservation work. The iconic bears have been downgraded from endangered to vulnerable status thanks to brilliant conservation efforts.

speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] And closer to home, <cite index="32-17,32-18,32-19">Australia's rooftop solar market has reached a new high, with about 341 megawatts of small-scale solar capacity added in March, marking a rise of nearly 20 percent</cite>. Mate, if you haven't gone solar yet, you're practically swimming upstream without a paddle.

speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] The pandas story really puts a smile on your face - sometimes the good guys do win. Back to you legends at the desk.
